name: Chocolate Chip Lace Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Semi-sweet or Milk chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Line two baking sheets with foil and spray with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add the egg and beat until well combined.
5. Stir in the vanilla and flour until a smooth batter forms.
6. Fold in the chocolate chips and chopped pecans.
7. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto the foil-lined baking sheets, spacing them at least 3 inches apart.
8. Bake for 7 to 10 minutes or until the edges are golden brown and the centers are set.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Yield: 24 to 30 cookies.
